'''ngajatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dlvy|dlvy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dlvy|dlvy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngajatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjæthæth|ngæjæthæth]] || [[word:ngæjæthæj|ngæjæthæj]] || [[word:ngæjæthæsh|ngæjæthæsh]] || [[word:ngæjæthæ|ngæjæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajajathath|ngajajathath]] || [[word:ngajajathaj|ngajajathaj]] || [[word:ngajajathash|ngajajathash]] || [[word:ngajajatha|ngajajatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajathath|ngajathath]] || [[word:ngajathaj|ngajathaj]] || [[word:ngajathash|ngajathash]] || [[word:ngajatha|ngajatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajafthath|ngajafthath]] || [[word:ngajafthaj|ngajafthaj]] || [[word:ngajafthash|ngajafthash]] || [[word:ngajafthaf|ngajafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajathatha|ngajathatha]] || [[word:ngajathaja|ngajathaja]] || [[word:ngajathasha|ngajathasha]] || [[word:ngajathaka|ngajathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajathath|ngajathath]] || [[word:ngajathaj|ngajathaj]] || [[word:ngajathash|ngajathash]] || [[word:ngajatha|ngajatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajathathal|ngajathathal]] || [[word:ngajathajal|ngajathajal]] || [[word:ngajathashal|ngajathashal]] || [[word:ngajathakal|ngajathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajathathatha|ngajathathatha]] || [[word:ngajathajaja|ngajathajaja]] || [[word:ngajathashasha|ngajathashasha]] || [[word:ngajathaka|ngajathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajathathan|ngajathathan]] || [[word:ngajathajan|ngajathajan]] || [[word:ngajathashan|ngajathashan]] || [[word:ngajathakan|ngajathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajathathaoro|ngajathathaoro]] || [[word:ngajathajaoro|ngajathajaoro]] || [[word:ngajathashaoro|ngajathashaoro]] || [[word:ngajathakaoro|ngajathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
